## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Shaped and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and blog post feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team liked the TeamViewer case study blog post, less enthusiastic about the AI recommendation engine post](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Plan to create \~30 case studies on top personalization/recommendation companies](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Will publish glossary terms as regular blog posts for now, potentially create dedicated glossary section later](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Aim to minimize mentions of Shaped in blog content, focus on providing value first](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Looking to improve blog UX and increase pages per session metric](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post Feedback

  - [TeamViewer case study post well-received, seen as shareable content](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [AI recommendation engine post viewed as basic SEO content, less engaging](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Glossary posts to be published as regular blog posts initially](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Plan to create \~30 case studies on top personalization/recommendation companies (e.g. FAANG, Pinterest, Spotify)](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Balance between SEO-focused pieces and more engaging, shareable content](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Minimize explicit mentions of Shaped, focus on providing value first](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Structure posts with challenges/pain points early, mention Shaped solution later](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Explore publishing on external platforms (Substack, Medium, Dev.to) for less biased perception](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Blog UX Improvements

  - [Team to compile list of suggested UX improvements](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Focus on incremental changes that can meaningfully impact metrics](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Priority on increasing pages per session metric](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Consider improvements to post recommendations and navigation between posts](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)

### Tools & Processes

  - [Exploring Audienceful tool for content management and email marketing](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide feedback on Audienceful or suggest alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Shaped team to provide detailed feedback on initial blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [GrowthX to draft one more case study post and glossary term for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Tullie to finalize list of \~30 companies for case studies](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile list of suggested blog UX improvements](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Jakub to research Audienceful and provide recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Continue calibration process to refine content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/zmsXdsGcX3yx_srFDjys1oACjiTxXkJg?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
